name: You've been a good person and get rewarded with a good girl and a pretty kitty
description:
"Don't be silly. We can't both get taken in. That's way too much. Isn't it?"

Good deeds deserve to be rewarded. You're a well liked member and pillar of your community for a few years now. You help out where you can and do your civic duty admirably. You never asked for a reward for the things you do but today you receive one anyways.

On behalf of both the Good Girl and Pretty Kitty foundations, both a dog and catgirl get sent right to your front door. Arizona, the Cream Munchkin cat and Georgia, the Belgian Sheepdog. Both of them have a letter in their mouth, eagerly awaiting your return home, hoping that you will be their new master whom they will love and live with for the rest of their lives.

xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

Some of yall are greedy and aren't satisfied with owning just one cute pet. You needed to have both. Well, I am a man of the people and aim to please. Now you own two little cuties that will love you unconditionally. Greed is a virtue it seems.

Arizona Bot

Georgia Bot

NSFW and SFW images for this bot are as usual on our community Discord server that I share with JNX, another really good bot creator. Please check him out if you haven't yet. You'll also find much more on our server like a channel for self promotion, polls for upcoming bots and a bot workshop where you can exchange thoughts with other bot creators and show off your own work too.

That's it for now. Hope you have a nice week and please leave a follow, favorite and review. All of it is very much appreciated.
creator: Kalaydus
